name: T LC Transportation
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State / BBB (TLC Transit, LLC); Sylvania Chamber of Commerce
notes: USDOT 2494993 found under 'TLC Transportation' at 5517 Telegraph Rd, Toledo, OH 43612 but is currently INACTIVE in SAFER. The operating entity appears to be TLC Transit, LLC (founded 2017 by Jon Elston, Holland OH 7710 Hill Ave) which provides NEMT and student transportation across Lucas/Fulton/Wood/Ottawa counties; the Toledo Telegraph Rd location is a separate listed address. TLC Transit, LLC has ~45 employees and grew from a 15-van NEMT operation. Likely operating intrastate without active FMCSA authority.

name: Map Transport LLC
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (Bassett, VA); company website maptransporttlv.com
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER 'MAP TRANSPORT LLC' records (USDOT 3228842/3543909 in Eloy AZ; 2831941 Harlingen TX; 1459717 Lumberton NC) are unrelated freight carriers. Bassett VA entity is a non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) service in Martinsville-Henry County, started 5/16/2020, incorporated 1/1/2021, BBB-accredited since 2/1/2022, ~6 employees, A+ BBB rating. Phone 276-421-2872. Address confirmed: 1570 Jarrett Dr, Bassett, VA 24055.

name: Heart & Soul Para Transit
registry_source: Colorado PUC Operating Rights System (reg744) listing at 200 E Swallow Rd, Fort Collins; company website heartandsoulparatransit.com
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). No SAFER records for 'HEART AND SOUL PARATRANSIT' or 'HEART & SOUL'. Family-run NEMT serving Fort Collins / Larimer County since ~2020 (per article: 'over 5 years' in 2026). 6 employees per ZoomInfo. Services include medical appointments, hospital discharge, dialysis, radiation therapy, wheelchair-accessible transport. Phone 970-690-3338. Operates under Colorado PUC authority rather than federal USDOT - consistent with intrastate paratransit operator.

name: Aces Transportation Svc
registry_source: Kansas Secretary of State business search (no direct match confirmed for Overland Park entity)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER results for 'ACES TRANSPORTATION' return unrelated carriers: ACES TRANSPORTATION LLC USDOT 4380012 (Darby, PA - 720 Macdade Blvd, 5 power units, intrastate PA NEMT) and ACES TRANSPORTATION USDOT 2951619 (Anaheim, CA). Neither matches Overland Park, KS at 9318 W 76th St. Kansas Secretary of State 2025 forfeiture lists show an 'ACES TRANSPORT LLC' in Hugoton, KS (different city). No clear active Kansas SOS record identified for the Overland Park address; entity may be a sole proprietorship / DBA or under a different legal name. Likely small intrastate operator.

name: Courtesy Coach
